name: Hippo Memory
description: Biologically-inspired memory for AI agents. Decay by default, retrieval strengthening, sleep consolidation.

budget.description: Default token budget for context injection (default: 1500)

autoContext.description: Auto-inject hippo context at session start (default: true)

autoLearn.description: Auto-capture errors during agent sessions (default: true)

autoSleep.description: Queue detached consolidation after sessions with 10+ new memories (default: false)

framing.description: How memories are framed in context (default: observe)

root.description: Custom .hippo directory path (default: auto-detect from workspace)
